title: Kalonymus oxyphylla
taxonomy: Kalonymus oxyphylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose family. This plant belongs to the genus Kalonymus, which is a group of deciduous shrubs. Kalonymus oxyphylla is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. It is often found growing in alpine meadows and rocky slopes at high elevations. As a member of the Rosaceae family, Kalonymus oxyphylla is related to other plants such as apples, pears, and roses.
